package eu.kalafatic.evolution.controller.vcs; import java.io.File; import java.util.ArrayList; import java.util.Arrays; import java.util.List; import eu.kalafatic.evolution.controller.tools.ShellTool; public class GitVersionControlProvider implements VersionControlProvider { private ShellTool shell = new ShellTool(); @Override public List<String> fetchCommits(File workingDir) throws Exception { String output = null; try { output = shell.execute("git log --oneline -n 20", workingDir, null); } catch (Exception e) { return new ArrayList<>(); } if (output == null || output.isEmpty()) return new ArrayList<>(); return Arrays.asList(output.split("
")); } @Override
